sprints.name: Sprint 2
sprints.goal: Sprint board with status workflow tracking.

tasks.title: Conduct literature review & draft Chapter 2
tasks.description: Review other web-based collaboration platforms and Agile project methodologies.

tasks.title: Design Figma wireframes and interaction flows
tasks.description: Develop clean intuitive layouts following design criteria for low-resource users.

tasks.title: Implement initial UI templates structure
tasks.description: Create responsive shell layout with navigation and view routers.

tasks.title: Create local store backend controllers
tasks.description: Design Express API routes for fetching tasks, users, and message history.

tasks.title: Develop Kanban interactive board with column swimlanes
tasks.description: Write reusable drag & drop layout in React with filters for sprints and priorities.

tasks.title: Set up WebSockets state broadcasting system
tasks.description: Configure robust real-time synchronization between active browser frames.

tasks.title: Integrate chat application panel into active screen
tasks.description: Standard side-bar or section with full messaging, file sharing, and auto-scrolling.

tasks.title: Draft evaluation metrics questionnaire
tasks.description: Prepare PSSUQ questions for measuring system performance and usability indicators.

messages.text: Welcome everyone to LASUSTECH Computer Science Team Collaboration Workspace! Let's get began with Sprint 1 developments.
Drafted Chapter 2 of the literature review! Uploaded the draft file here in the shared files workspace for your feedback.
Awesome work Abiola! I will verify the wireframes and pair Mubarak to initiate the frontend template setups today.
